zh.Maresfield, Sussex, England: 英國素可馬雷斯費爾德

zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Stephens於1510年出生在英國肯特斯托可波利時，她的父親Thomas Stephens31歲，母親Margaret Hastings26歲。她和Sir Robert Turke至少有1個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1576年在英國英格蘭素可馬雷斯費爾德享年66歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特斯塔普勒爾斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Stephens于1510年出生在英国肯特斯托可波利时，她的父亲Thomas Stephens31岁，母亲Margaret Hastings26岁。她和Sir Robert Turke至少有1个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1576年在英国英格兰素可馬雷斯費爾德享年66岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特斯塔普勒爾斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Stephens
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Stevens
meanings: English (London), Flemish, Dutch, and North German: patronymic from the personal name Steven . The surname of Flemish origin is also found in the Walloon part of Belgium. In North America, the English form of the surname has also absorbed some like-sounding Jewish names and various other European cognates, e.g. Greek Stefanidis , Serbian Stevanović (see Stevanovic ), Slovenian and Slovak Štefanič (see Stefanic ).

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Stephens was born in 1510, in Stockbury, Kent, England, her father, Thomas Stephens, was 31 and her mother, Margaret Hastings, was 26. She had at least 1 son and 4 daughters with Sir Robert Turke. She died in 1576, in Maresfield, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66, and was buried in Staplehurst, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Stephens est née en 1510, à Stockbury, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Stephens, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margaret Hastings, avait 26 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles avec Sir Robert Turke. Elle est décédée en 1576, à Maresfield, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Staplehurst, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Stephens 1510 in Stockbury, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Stephens 31 und ihre Mutter Margaret Hastings 26. Sie hatte mit Sir Robert Turke mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1576 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Maresfield, Sussex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Staplehurst, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Stephens è nata il nel 1510 nel Stockbury, Kent, England, sua padre, Thomas Stephens, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Margaret Hastings, aveva 26 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie con Sir Robert Turke. Morì nel 1576, nel Maresfield, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolta a Staplehurst, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Stephensが1510年にイギリスケントストクブリーで生まれた時，父Thomas Stephensは31歳，母Margaret Hastingsは26歳であった。彼女はSir Robert Turkeとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1576年にイギリスイギリススセックスマレスフィールドで66歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントスタプレハルストにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Stephens(이)가 1510년 영국 켄트 스톡버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Stephens(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Hastings(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 Sir Robert Turke(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1576년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 마스필드에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 스타플레후르스트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Stephens nasceu em 1510, em Stockbury, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Stephens, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Hastings, tinha 26 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas com Sir Robert Turke. Ela faleceu em 1576, em Maresfield, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em Staplehurst, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Stephens родилась в 1510 г. в местности стоккбури, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Stephens было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Hastings, 26. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери от Sir Robert Turke. Она умерла в 1576 г. в местности маресфиелд, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности стаплэурст, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

Murió en 1576, en Maresfield, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultada en Staplehurst, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
